title: Ecosystems Configuration
description: Schema for ecosystems.yaml - multi-ecosystem deployment configuration for DS apps

version.description: Schema version for future compatibility. Currently must be 1.

app.description: App metadata used for stack naming and resource identification

name.description: App name used in stack names, domain prefixes, and resource naming. Must be lowercase alphanumeric with hyphens, 3-30 chars.

displayName.description: Human-readable display name for UI and logging. Optional.

ecosystems.description: List of ecosystems this app participates in

name.description: Ecosystem name. Must match a registered ecosystem in the central registry.

enabled.description: Whether to deploy to this ecosystem. Set false to temporarily disable without removing.

sso_app_id.description: SSO app ID registered with the ecosystem's account service. Defaults to app.name if omitted.
